subcodes.first_line: Two matters are of surpassing greatness: first, the recognition of the Most Great Announcement, and second, steadfastness in its acceptance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دو امر عظیمست یکی عرفان نباء اعظم و آخر استقامت بر ان کینونت قبول
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God
